infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Toll Navigator uses your location to suggest nearby cities and calculate routes from your current position.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Toll Navigator tracks your location in the background to automatically record miles per state for your IFTA quarterly fuel tax report.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Toll Navigator tracks your location in the background to automatically record miles per state for your IFTA quarterly fuel tax report.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Toll Navigator uses the camera to scan fuel receipts for OCR processing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Toll Navigator accesses your photo library to scan saved fuel receipts.
